message:
Fix duplicate function and incorrect usage hint

- workflow-builder.tsx: Remove duplicate generateWorkflowMarkdown
  and import from @jeffreysprompts/core/export instead

- bundles.ts: Fix usage hint from "jfp bundle show <id>" to
  "jfp bundle <id>" (there is no "show" subcommand)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
